text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One peaceful day, after the fierce struggle and
tussle through the Twinkle Series with Inari One...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I think it's about time to cash in that check! You
still got that vacation ticket on you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nice! Then let's get a move on. Our celebratory
hot spring getaway starts now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! The water felt great! And no better way to
top it off than with some cold fruit-flavored milk!
Kicked my fatigue right to the curb!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, we've got some time till grub time, so
how 'bout a walk?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hm? Whazzis say? "Come and enjoy the hot-as-hell bath in the neighboring facility."

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No way! I gotta have a looksie! An Edo kid has to
know how hot a hell bath can be!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Boss, you go on without me! I'm taggin' in for
round two!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Boss, you go on without me! I'm taggin' in for
round two!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh, who do ya take me for? I'm the mighty Inari
One! Only thing I'll be givin' myself is a great
time!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What the... They sure weren't exaggerating callin'
this "hot-as-hell."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One stays in the extra hot water for too long
and winds up becoming dizzy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I just needed to lie down for a bit... But I'm
all good now!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hup!
choice_data_list: You should probably take it easy...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Nope. I'm not spendin' the rest of this experience
in dreamland!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go cool off in the night air. Let's get
goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I wanna go cool off in the night air. Let's get
goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Phew... It sure is quiet 'round here. Far cry from
the hustle and bustle I'm used to.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's not what I mean. I like a change of
pace every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The peace and quiet of everyday life makes a
festival more excitin' by contrast. Get what I
mean?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
My daily routine with you at my side was like a
constant party...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Which makes quiet nights like this all the more important. And tonight we're relaxin' in style.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Besides, it's still a looong road ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Ya hear that comin' from over there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, I hear a faint, but recognizable
sound. It's...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Festival music!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No way! They've got a festival goin' on! We can't
miss out on this!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ya feel that adrenaline rush?! Let's check it out!
choice_data_list: B-but what about the peace and quiet?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ya feel that adrenaline rush?! Let's check it out!
choice_data_list: B-but what about the peace and quiet?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I've had my fill! Everyday's a festival for us Edo
folks! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking me by the hand, Inari One pulls me in the
direction of the music.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wahoo! It's festival time!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Inari One and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
